meaning: vi.鸣(钟),连响,执拗地讲vt.反复地说给人家听n.钟声
examples: Ding Rong is a teacher from the Fourth Middle School of Beijing.
Ding Jie said, "People were excited to see two travelers driving a foreign license car, appearing on their streets."
I got a ding in my rear fender.
With a track record like that, why did Jobs even bother to ding Samsung?
Not exactly a bold measure, but this is the ding dong of the new budget.
